name: 异界战记
short_description: Outland Chronicles is a 2D card battle game. 1. More than 100 hero cards, each of which can have an effect. The more hero cards you collect, the stronger your strength. 2. Random enemies, random rewards, random hands, luck is also a part of strength.
detailed_description:
Alien Wars tells the story of traveling to a different world where you need to gather companions and survive.

pattern

Divided into plot mode and battle mode. The plot mode will have a unique storyline with accompanying map exploration. At present, there are a total of 15 maps in the battle mode, without any storyline, and it is necessary to defeat each map boss and keep moving forward.

card

Main player/profession card: You can choose a profession card at the beginning of each game, and different professions have different skills and genres. Professional cards can enhance attributes such as HP, hand count, and attack frequency.

Hero Cards: Hero cards represent the companions you collect, with levels of attack, defense, hit, evasion, critical strike, and other numerical values. They have their own unique skills and professions, with rarity levels of gray, green, blue, purple, and orange, growth rates of different attributes, and high growth rates of silver and gold cards. Hero cards can inherit the abilities and skills obtained in storyline mode and battle mode, and can cultivate a super powerful card. At the same time, hero cards can form teams, and captain cards will inherit some of the abilities and skills of team members' cards. No card is useless, and the more companions you collect, the stronger your strength.

Strategy Cards: Various types of strategies that can be used in each game, such as obtaining hands, reducing enemy hands, dealing damage, awakening skills, and so on.

battle

At the beginning of each game, hands are obtained based on the number of hands, and at each subsequent stage, hands are obtained based on the number of touches. The hand may be a hero card or a strategy card.

Both sides take turns in their actions, going through the stages of combat, support, resonance, combination, judgment, hand drawing, playing, and discard. Use the hero card to deal damage to the opponent, use the strategy card to consume the opponent's strength, and reduce the opponent's HP to 0 to win.

The main general card has power, which can be divided into offensive, defensive, debunking, breaking, flashing, bouncing, and technical power. Offensive: Enhance hero card attacks. Defense: The armor of the main general can withstand damage. Mie Shi: Enhance the critical strike of hero cards. Breaking Power: Enhance the breaking power of hero cards. Flash: The evasion of the main general's card. Bounce: When the main card is damaged, it will bounce back damage equivalent to the bounce to the attacking side. Skill: Enhance the triggering probability of hero card skills.

Hero cards have attributes of stone, scissors, paper, and regular. Stones, scissors, and paper are mutually reinforcing and restraining, and are neither restrained nor restrained by any attributes. During hero card battles, not only should offensive and defensive values be considered, but also attribute restraint and hero skill effects.

During the support phase, you can choose a hero card to support. This choice is important, considering factors such as coevolution, resonance effects, and attribute restraint. A reasonable choice can even reverse the situation.

In the resonance stage, points will be settled based on the suit and points of the cards. Hearts, diamonds, clubs, and spades will be settled separately, and special card types such as straight cards can earn higher points. Points will increase based on the current profession's genre, including offensive, defensive, recovery, potential damage, and more.

If there are three cards with the same attributes and rarity in the merging stage, it will trigger the three in one merging evolution, and the evolved cards will have strong attribute values.

If there is a battle on the hero card during the playing phase but HP does not return to 0, the hero card will enter the battle zone and automatically launch an attack on the enemy during each battle phase.

At the beginning of the game, there will be frequent deaths. After continuous battles to earn points, unlock more companions, strengthen cards and skills, and ultimately achieve victory.

skill

There are about 200 skills in total, and there is no upper limit to the number of skills that players can obtain. They can also have dozens of skills at the same time. Each skill can be upgraded to gain stronger abilities. Players can build different skill builds in each round to gain different experiences. Hero cards can also have multiple skills, with no upper limit on the number of skills.
